recommended_exercises.Name: Walking
recommended_exercises.Description: Brisk walking at moderate intensity for sustained periods
recommended_exercises.Benefits: Improves cardiovascular health and insulin sensitivity with low injury risk

recommended_exercises.Name: Bodyweight Squats
recommended_exercises.Description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, lower hips back and down
recommended_exercises.Benefits: Builds lower body strength, improves glucose uptake in muscles

findings.weekly_plan: 3 days/week: 30 min brisk walking + 15 min bodyweight exercises. Focus on consistency over intensity. Clinical markers suggest lifestyle intervention over medication.

summary: Lifestyle intervention plan for clinical-positive but genetically low-risk patient. Focus on walking and bodyweight exercises to manage glucose through activity rather than medication.
